property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Microsoft MPI\Bin\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23 in;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.10 in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users
agen\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users

pm;C:\Users
agen\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;.

testcase.name: testLoginPageFactory
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. 1776172770783 geckodriver INFO Listening on 127.0.0.1:8085 1776172770981 mozrunner::runner INFO Running command: "C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe" "--marionette" "-no-remote" "-profile" "C:\\Users\\nagen\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\rust_mozprofile7dF8y2" console.warn: services.settings: Ignoring preference override of remote settings server console.warn: services.settings: Allow by setting MOZ_REMOTE_SETTINGS_DEVTOOLS=1 in the environment 1776172771334 Marionette INFO Marionette enabled Dynamically enable window occlusion 0 1776172771423 Marionette INFO Listening on port 63930 Read port: 63930 1776172771621 RemoteAgent WARN TLS certificate errors will be ignored for this session Apr 14, 2026 6:49:33 PM org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake createSession INFO: Detected dialect: W3C console.warn: LoginRecipes: "Falling back to a synchronous message for: https://www.saucedemo.com." console.warn: LoginRecipes: "Falling back to a synchronous message for: https://www.saucedemo.com."

testcase.name: testFullFlowPageFactory
